name: kitchen-sink
description: The Skal demo app. Showcases every fast-path widget, the store, custom widgets, navigation, the JS-side probes, and the render bench.

scripts._bytecode_note_1: // bytecode build MUST use vendored bun — JSC bytecode is JSC-version-keyed.
scripts._bytecode_note_2: // `find-vendored-bun.sh` locks onto vendor/bun/build/release/bun(-profile), not the $PATH bun.
scripts._bytecode_note_3: // Drift silently invalidates .jsc at runtime → fallback to parsing → cold-start regression with no error.
scripts._flutter_web_plugins: // ── B.5 hidden Flutter Web plugin host (see docs/WEB_SUPPORT_PLAN.md) ──
scripts._dev: // ── Native dev (rebuild JS bundle, hand off to flutter run) ──
scripts.dev:flutter: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run
scripts.dev:macos: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d macos
scripts.dev:ios: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d iphone-simulator
scripts.dev:android: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter run -d android
scripts.build:macos: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build macos --release
scripts.build:ios: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build ios --release
scripts.build:android: bun run build && cd flutter-host && flutter build apk --release --target-platform android-arm64
scripts.codegen: cd flutter-host && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
scripts.clean: cd flutter-host && flutter clean && rm -rf ../../dist dist build
scripts.platforms: cd flutter-host && flutter create --org com.skal --project-name kitchen_sink --platforms macos,ios,android .
